title: NC State Basketball Tickets Available for 2026 ACC Tournament
summary: Tickets are now available for the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte, where NC State will compete.
charlotte_impact: Attending the ACC tournament is a popular local event, boosting tourism and local business.

title: Stanley Martin Homes Opens New Community in Sherrills Ford, NC
summary: Stanley Martin Homes celebrates the grand opening of Essence at Laurelbrook, its first ESSENCE community in the Charlotte market.
charlotte_impact: New housing developments indicate growth in the Charlotte metropolitan area.

title: Trump Misstates Facts About NC Case in State of the Union
summary: President Trump incorrectly stated the origin of a suspect in a Charlotte murder case during the State of the Union address.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the intersection of national politics and local crime, raising questions about accuracy.

title: Swimming Pool Filter Maker Hayward Has Large Plant in Clemmons, NC
summary: Hayward, a Charlotte-based company, is a major employer in Clemmons with over 1,000 workers.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the presence of significant manufacturing employers in the region.

title: Trade Shows in Charlotte Leverage Custom Canopy Tents for Brand Visibility
summary: Exhibitors at Charlotte trade shows are focusing on flexibility, visibility, and ROI through custom canopy tents.
charlotte_impact: Trade shows are important for local business and marketing, driving economic activity.

title: Mosaic Capital Partners Seeks Vice President of Business Development in Charlotte
summary: Mosaic Capital Partners, a Charlotte-based private equity firm, is seeking a VP of Business Development.
charlotte_impact: Indicates growth and investment activity in the Charlotte financial sector.

title: Florence Regional Airport Passengers Increased in 2025
summary: Florence Regional Airport saw increased passenger traffic in 2025 but lost an American Airlines flight to Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the changing dynamics of regional air travel and connectivity.

title: Plane Crash in Indian Trail Injures Two; Investigation Underway
summary: Two people were injured after a plane crashed in a cow pasture in Indian Trail. NTSB and FAA are investigating.
charlotte_impact: Plane crashes raise safety concerns and require thorough investigation.

title: Gaston County Man Accused of Possessing Child Sex Abuse Material
summary: A Gaston County man is facing charges for allegedly possessing and distributing child sex abuse material.
charlotte_impact: Child exploitation is a serious crime with devastating consequences for victims.

title: Charlotte City Council Approves $37.9M for Red Line Commuter Rail Design
summary: Charlotte City Council approved $37.9M for the next phase of the Red Line commuter rail design, aiming for 30% completion by 2027.
charlotte_impact: Significant investment in public transportation infrastructure for future development.

title: SCDPH Reports Two New Measles Cases in Upstate Outbreak
summary: South Carolina health officials report two new measles cases, bringing the Upstate outbreak total to 993.
charlotte_impact: Measles outbreaks are a public health concern, especially with vaccine hesitancy.

title: Family Seeks Dropped Charges in Teacher's Death After Senior Prank
summary: Family of a Hall County teacher killed in a senior prank gone wrong wants charges dropped against the teenagers involved.
charlotte_impact: Tragic accident raises questions about accountability and forgiveness.

title: Pedestrian Dies Months After Being Struck by Alleged Drunk Driver
summary: A 75-year-old pedestrian died from injuries sustained after being hit by an allegedly impaired driver in December.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of drunk driving and its devastating consequences.

title: North Carolina Reaches $13B in Sports Bets After Two Years of Legalization
summary: North Carolina bettors wagered over $581 million in February, up more than 10% from February 2025.
charlotte_impact: Legalized sports betting generates significant revenue and impacts the local economy.

title: Partial Government Shutdown Could Cause Longer TSA Wait Times at Charlotte Airport
summary: Charlotte airport warns passengers of potential longer TSA wait times due to a partial government shutdown.
charlotte_impact: Government shutdowns can disrupt travel and impact airport operations.
